title: Hollymeth
description: BruceWang FPS booster, optimizer modpack attempting to make Minecraft as lightweight performance as possible.
body:
👁👄👁

Hollymeth is a straightforward performance modpack that aims to keep the game running as quickly as possible while maintaining excellent visuals. It is designed to be a sort of "base layer" that you can create your own modpacks and instances on top of or use on its own. It is intended to require the fewest modifications while still providing the best performance. Just optimization; no quality-of-life modifications. Here is a brief video that highlights some of Adrenaline's salient characteristics and contrasts it with Vanilla.

- Optimizer🎮

Hollymeth can significantly enhance the performance of your game by using various optimization mods and configurations. You can expect faster startup times, quicker world loading, and a very high increase in framerates, with some tests showing a boost of up to 10 times the performance with Adrenaline compared to not having any mods installed.

- Complexity🤑

Hollymeth is made to work with a variety of gadgets, even those with very basic specifications. Because of this, it can be used with a variety of hardware setups. Although I can't confirm it because I don't own a Mac, the pack is compatible with Windows, Linux, and probably Mac as well. Due to its more adaptable design and native compatibility with Fabric, Adrenaline is also significantly more mod-compatible than OptiFine.

- Installation guide🧠

If you need help installing the modpack, please refer to this wiki tutorial or the instructions in the Modrinth documentation linked above. In the post-install section of the wiki, you can learn how to adjust things to provide greater optimizations after installing the pack. This covers actions like increasing your allotted memory, adjusting your device's game settings, and some more complex things like modifying your Java runtime and JVM flags.
